title: goniopteris baorucensis
intro: Goniopteris baorucensis, also known as the Baorucensis fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Peruvian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Goniopteris baorucensis include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as serving as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Goniopteris baorucensis can be made by boiling the leaves in water to create a medicinal tea or infusing them in oil to create a topical ointment.
